{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the distribution of individual scholarship amounts"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the distribution of individual scholarship amounts"},"startedAt":1771855838261,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to see the distribution of individual scholarship amounts. This requires grouping scholarships by amount and counting occurrences, then ordering by amount to show the distribution pattern. The scholarships table has an 'amount' column (numeric type) that contains the scholarship values.","sql":"
SELECT 
  amount,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM public.scholarships
GROUP BY amount
ORDER BY amount ASC

visualization.title: Distribution of Individual Scholarship Amounts
visualization.description: Shows the frequency and percentage distribution of scholarship amounts

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  amount,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM public.scholarships
GROUP BY amount
ORDER BY amount ASC

visualization.title: Distribution of Individual Scholarship Amounts
visualization.description: Shows the frequency and percentage distribution of scholarship amounts

result.sql:
SELECT 
  amount,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM public.scholarships
GROUP BY amount
ORDER BY amount ASC
